app.name: ULTRA CONTENT MAKER
app.tagline: From onboarding to a validated Content Brain, then LinkedIn content that stays on brand.

footer.tagline: Ultra Content Maker: AI ghostwriter for LinkedIn, an NS Suite tool for entrepreneurs.

report.hint: An email will be sent to the team with error context (your API key is never included).
report.failed: Could not send the report. Try again later.

codes.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
codes.noLlmKey: No API key configured. Add your key in Settings → API key.
codes.invalidApiKey: The provider rejected this API key. Check it is active and matches the selected service (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.).
codes.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits on your provider account. Add billing on the provider console (e.g. console.anthropic.com), then try again.
codes.rateLimit: Too many requests. Wait one or two minutes, then try again.
codes.timeout: The request timed out. Try again on a stable connection.
codes.verifyFailed: Key test failed. See details below or top up provider credits.
codes.llmRequestFailed: The AI provider did not respond correctly. Retry or check your key and credits.
codes.linkedinPerplexity: Live LinkedIn analysis works best with a Perplexity (Sonar) key in Settings.
codes.linkedinFetchUnavailable: Could not read LinkedIn activity right now. Add Perplexity (Sonar) or try again later.
codes.analysisFailed: Strategic analysis failed. Check your LinkedIn activity URL and try again.
codes.strategyParseFailed: The AI returned an unreadable response. Run the analysis again.
codes.notActivityUrl: Invalid activity URL, use the …/recent-activity/all/ link from your LinkedIn profile.
codes.fetchFailed: Could not fetch content from this link.
codes.noContent: No usable content found on this page.
codes.invalidJson: Incomplete or unreadable AI response. Try again.
codes.emptyResponse: Empty response from the provider. Try again.
codes.newsFiltered: No recent news matches your filters. Broaden your keywords.
codes.noRecentNews: No recent news found for your criteria.
codes.noNewsResults: No results. Adjust your news keywords.
codes.invalidBody: Invalid request. Reload the page and try again.
codes.emailNotConfigured: Email reporting is not configured on the server.
codes.reportFailed: Report could not be sent right now.

hints.linkedin_requires_perplexity: Perplexity Sonar can browse the web to read your public activity feed.
hints.linkedin_fetch_unavailable: If you only use Claude, analysis can still use your profile without a live LinkedIn scan.

hero.headline: Publish on LinkedIn in your voice.
hero.headlineSubtitle: Persona, brief, and 4 qualified drafts : one-click export. No lost evenings, no generic ChatGPT filler.
hero.subheadline: Express setup · 4 paths · creator radar · commented news
hero.benefit: Platform AI on trial · built-in brief and quality scores · you keep full publish control.
hero.microTrust: 15 days · 4 posts to publish · no credit card

product.title: What actually beats ChatGPT or a freelancer
product.subtitle: Four WOW moments, then one flow from brief to LinkedIn export.
product.mockupAria: Product showcase: 4-draft batch, Persona, quality, and journey
product.mockupSummary: Four-draft batch, Persona Content Brain, anti-slop Quality Panel, creator radar, four-step journey.

wowHero.title: 4 qualified drafts in one batch
wowHero.body: Two reach angles, two niche angles, you pick the draft worth polishing, not whatever the AI chose alone.

persona.title: Persona & Topic DNA
persona.body: AI learns your voice, pillars, and off-limits. Once validated, every post starts from your Content Brain, not a blank page.

batch.title: Creator radar
batch.body: 3 relevant creators per day in your niche: visit, save as inspiration, or launch a post from their angle : no endless LinkedIn scrolling.

quality.title: Anti-slop Quality Panel
quality.body: Niche clarity, proof, and conversation scores · LinkedIn cliché detection · alternative hooks · one-click export.

posts.post4: How a LatAm deal is structured when you've seen the film in China.

brief.samplePov: The lever isn't price : it's end-to-end visibility.

Sharp hook…

Body with case and metric…

product.caption: 4 paths → brief → 4 drafts → quality → export.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps : from LinkedIn profile to the post you publish in your own name.

setup.title: Express setup
setup.description: Paste your LinkedIn URL: AI seeds your Persona in minutes. Refine at your own pace.

persona.title: Validated Persona
persona.description: Content Brain + Topic DNA: pillars, beliefs, off-limits. Nothing starts from a blank page.

create.title: Create from 4 sources
create.description: Profile, daily news, inspiration (anti-plagiarism), or free topic : intent brief and 4 drafts per batch.

publish.title: Polish & publish
publish.description: Quality Panel, alternative hooks, first comment, Copy to LinkedIn export. You stay in control.

profile.title: Profile & inspirations
profile.description: Links, voice, sample posts : the foundation of your Persona.

brief.title: Intent brief
brief.description: Objective, problem, POV, proof : every batch is framed.

generate.title: Generate & choose
generate.description: 4 posts (2 broad · 2 niche) or 2 from archived news.

voice.title: Your voice
voice.description: A few links to get started. The agent summarizes who you are : editable anytime.

capabilities.title: Everything you need to publish with credibility : without hiring a freelancer
capabilities.subtitle: Six building blocks for B2B experts and solo founders who want consistency without losing their voice.

persona.title: Persona & Topic DNA
persona.description: Validated Content Brain before any generation: positioning, audience, angle, pillars, AI writes like you, not like everyone.

sources.title: 4 creation paths
sources.description: From your profile, niche news, an inspiration (paste, URL, library), or a free topic, a distinct angle every time.

radar.title: Creator radar
radar.description: 3 relevant creators per day in your niche: visit their profile, save as inspiration, or launch a post from their angle.

exploration.title: Exploration · 4 posts
exploration.description: Two reach angles, two niche angles per batch, you pick the draft worth polishing.

quality.title: LinkedIn Quality Panel
quality.description: Niche clarity, human voice, proof, conversation scores · anti-slop · alternative hooks · in-body link warning.

distribution.title: Distribution & news
distribution.description: PDF carousel, video script, first comment, hashtags · fresh news and archives · FR/EN/ES translations.

brief.title: Intent brief
brief.description: Objective, problem, POV, required proof : no more vague interchangeable posts.

measurement.title: Measurement loop
measurement.description: After publishing: saves, DMs, qualified comments : synthesis to refine your Persona.

trust.headline: For professionals who publish under their own name
trust.points: Less friction than a freelancer on the brief. More control than a ChatGPT prompt.
trust.subpoints: Free trial with platform AI included · Pro $19/mo (your API key) · Pro+ $33/mo (AI included, zero setup) · you publish : we never post for you.

footer.tagline: AI ghostwriter for LinkedIn, an NS Suite tool for entrepreneurs.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your email or Google account

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Start with your first client persona

errors.config: Firebase is not configured. Add keys to .env.local (see .env.example).
errors.invalidCredential: Incorrect email or password. If you don't have an account, sign up first.
errors.userNotFound: No account with this email. Sign up to create one.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use. Sign in instead.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.popupBlocked: Google popup was blocked. Allow popups for 127.0.0.1, close any firebaseapp.com tab, reload the login page, and try again.
errors.providerDisabled: This sign-in method is not enabled in Firebase (Authentication → Sign-in method).
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized. In Firebase → Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains, add "localhost" and "127.0.0.1" (no http or port).
errors.networkFailed: Network unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unavailable: Authentication service unavailable. Restart the dev server (npm run dev) after changing .env.local.
errors.googleRedirectTimeout: Google sign-in timed out. Click Cancel, then try the Google button again (popup) or use email sign-in.

adminAnalytics.title: Usage dashboard
adminAnalytics.subtitle: Unique connections, profiles, drafts, and per-user activity.
adminAnalytics.footnote: Connections are tracked from the next login/signup onward. Usage score combines articles, rework, and logins.

connections.title: Unique connections
connections.empty: No connections recorded yet. Data appears after users sign in.

articleModes.title: Creation style mix
articleModes.subtitle: Share of posts by wizard path (included users only)
articleModes.empty: No posts from included users yet.

statsScope.filtered: KPIs and creation mix reflect {included} of {total} users (checked rows).

usersTable.title: Users (sortable ranking)
usersTable.name: Name
usersTable.sortBy: Click a column header to sort
usersTable.confirmDelete: Delete this account and all its data? This cannot be undone.

control.confirmControl: Link this account to yours for agency-style management (Support Total, etc.)?
control.controlSuccess: Account linked — available under Active account.
control.confirmRelease: Remove your access to this account? The client keeps their workspace.

errors.adminNotConfigured: Platform admin not configured. Check environment variables.

blocked.title: Blocked users
blocked.subtitle: Accounts that can no longer generate content

invite.subtitle: Complete your profile to get started with your LinkedIn ghostwriter.
invite.title: Welcome
invite.body: Create an account or sign in to complete onboarding. Your answers fill your profile, your coach can also access it from their dashboard.

errors.expired: This link has expired. Ask your coach for a new one.
errors.ownerCannotClaim: You are signed in as the coach. Share this link with your client, or sign out and let them create their account.
errors.used: This link was already used by another account.
errors.claimFailed: Could not activate the invitation. Try again or contact your coach.

workspaceAccounts.label: Active account
workspaceAccounts.invitePanelBody: Send this link to {name} so they can complete their profile from their own account. The link stays valid for 90 days.
workspaceAccounts.inviteCopied: Link copied. Send it to your client.
workspaceAccounts.deleteAccountConfirm: Delete “{name}” and all its content (profile, Persona, posts)?
workspaceAccounts.linkClientHint: The client must already have an account. Enter their email to access their workspace without duplicating their profile.

linkClientErrors.user_not_found: No user found with this email.
linkClientErrors.client_doc_missing: Account not found, the client must sign up first.
linkClientErrors.cannot_link_self: You cannot link your own account.
linkClientErrors.client_already_managed: This client is already linked to another coach.
linkClientErrors.forbidden: This action is limited to platform administrators.

workspaceAccounts.agencyBannerSubtitle: Actions on this page create content for this client, not your personal account.
workspaceAccounts.unlinkClientAccount: Remove access to this client account
workspaceAccounts.unlinkClientConfirm: Remove access to “{name}”? The client keeps their account; you will no longer see their workspace here.

llmKeyDialog.title: API key required
llmKeyDialog.body: Add your Perplexity or OpenAI key to generate your Persona and LinkedIn posts.

welcome.title: Your first post in minutes
welcome.subtitle: We start simple. Nothing is set in stone, you can complete and refine every step anytime.
pillars: The minimum to get started · no need to be perfect on day one.
Every step stays editable after you validate it.
The more you use it, the more your posts sound like you.
welcome.resumeHint: You already started ({percent}%). Pick up whenever you like.

hub.completedEmpty: Nothing done yet · start with your profile.

setupLlm.title: AI connection
setupLlm.description: AI powers your Persona and posts. Trial: included. Pro: add your key whenever you want.

authorEssential.title: Your profile
authorEssential.description: Refine role, bio, inspirations, and documents, anytime, without blocking creation.

audience.title: Your audience (optional)
audience.description: Clarify who you write for, or skip to test right away.

persona.title: Your Persona
persona.description: AI summarizes what it learned about you. Review, validate, then edit if needed.

startReady.title: First post
startReady.description: Your profile is ready · launch your first draft.

articlesNew.title: Create a new post
articlesNew.description: Return to the assistant for a new brief or intention.

startHub.title: Resume setup
startHub.description: Check your progress and continue where you left off.

setupExpress.title: Express start
setupExpress.description: Your LinkedIn + language. The AI prefills the rest so you can test right away.

ready.title: You're set
ready.subtitle: You can create your first post. Your profile and Persona will keep improving as you publish and give feedback.

persona.title: One last step before creating
persona.description: Review what AI understood about your profile and voice. Validate to unlock creation, everything stays editable.

llm.title: Connect AI
llm.description: Trial: AI is already active. Pro: add your API key to generate Persona and posts · change anytime in settings.

author.title: Describe your profile
author.description: Your LinkedIn URL, role, and positioning help AI calibrate your voice. Everything else is optional.

audience.title: Your audience (optional)
audience.description: Clarify who you write for more targeted posts, or skip and come back later.

generic.title: Almost there
generic.description: One more step, then you can create your first post.

express.title: Express start
express.description: Paste your LinkedIn and pick a language. That's the minimum to generate a first post.

guard.redirecting: Taking you to the next step…

llm.title: Your API key
llm.subtitle: One key is enough (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or Perplexity) for the whole product: Persona, posts, news, inspiration, and LinkedIn analysis. Stored in your workspace, readable only by you.
llm.privacyNote: Never share your key. You can revoke or rotate it anytime at your provider.

trust.title: Your key stays under your control
trust.summary: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key): you pay your AI provider directly. Ultra Content Maker does not resell credits.
bullets: Key stored in your personal workspace, isolated from other accounts.
Sent over HTTPS only when you run a generation.
Validated once on save, never shown in plain text after that.
Revocable anytime from your provider console (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.).
trust.privacyReminder: Never share your key by email or chat. If it leaks, revoke it at your provider immediately, then save a new key here.

invoices.title: Wire billing history
invoices.subtitle: Invoices for wire transfer subscriptions.
invoices.pendingHint: Pending invoices must be paid before month end to keep access.

dataManagement.title: Data management
dataManagement.subtitle: Reset or erase your workspace.
dataManagement.warning: These actions cannot be undone. Copy any validated posts you need before continuing.

reset.title: Restart my profile
reset.description: Clears your profile, Persona, inspirations, and post library. Your API key is kept, you restart at the My profile step.
reset.confirm: Restart your profile? Your posts and Persona will be deleted. Your API key will be kept.

delete.title: Erase all my data
delete.description: Removes everything: profile, Persona, posts, and API key. No editorial data will remain on the platform.

errors.adminNotConfigured: Action unavailable (server not configured). Contact support.
errors.generic: Could not complete the action. Try again.

errors.keyTooShort: The API key looks too short. Make sure you copied the full key.
errors.invalidKey: This API key was rejected by the provider. Check that it is active and matches the selected service.
errors.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits on this provider account (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.). Add billing on the provider console, then try again.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save the key. Try again.

openai.name: OpenAI (ChatGPT)
steps: Go to API keys → Create new secret key
Copy the key (shown once) and paste it below

perplexity.name: Perplexity
steps: Copy the key starting with pplx-

google.name: Google Gemini
steps: Get API key → create a key for your Google Cloud project

trialIncluded.body: Your trial includes platform AI : no key required to get started.

platformIncluded.body: Your plan includes platform AI, you can add your own key later in settings.

author.title: My profile
author.subtitle: Add your LinkedIn, role, and positioning, AI uses them to build your Persona. Everything else is optional and editable later.
author.enrichSubtitle: Your express start info is already saved. Add what's missing here. LinkedIn activity, documents, inspirations, without re-entering everything.

hint.essential: Your LinkedIn URL is the only field required to move on.
hint.voice: Role, bio, and language: AI uses them to calibrate your Persona and post tone.
hint.inspirations: Optional references to enrich your Persona, add them whenever you like.

enrichHint.essential: Your LinkedIn is already saved. Add activity URL, website, or blog here, all optional.
enrichHint.voice: Role, bio, and language come from express start. Enrich with documents or reference posts.
enrichHint.inspirations: Add creators or posts that inspire you to refine your Persona.

requiredNote.essential: LinkedIn required · website and blog optional.
requiredNote.voice: Role, positioning, and language required to continue · reference documents and posts are optional.
requiredNote.inspirations: Everything here is optional. Add inspirations when you want to deepen your Persona.

enrichRequiredNote.essential: LinkedIn already provided · fields below are optional additions.
enrichRequiredNote.voice: Role and bio already provided · documents and reference posts are optional.
enrichRequiredNote.inspirations: Everything optional. Add inspirations to refine your Persona.

author.linkedinHint: Your public LinkedIn profile · AI reads it to understand your expertise (targeted read, not blind scraping).
author.linkedinActivityHint: Your profile's recent activity page · AI analyzes ~2 months of posts to calibrate your voice and recommendations.
author.linkedinActivityNotActivity: Use a LinkedIn posts feed URL: personal recent activity (…/recent-activity/all/) or company page (…/company/…/posts/).

errors.notActivityUrl: URL is not a recognized LinkedIn posts feed (profile or company page).
errors.duplicate: This link is already in the list.

linkedinActivity.title: LinkedIn post feeds
linkedinActivity.hint: Add one or more feeds: your personal posts and/or your company page. AI analyzes ~2 months of activity to calibrate voice and recommendations.

web.title: Websites & web pages
web.hint: Site, blog, product page, or any page that helps understand your positioning (multiple links allowed).

author.positioning: A few lines about you and your positioning
author.positioningHint: Describe what you do and what sets you apart. Consultant: expertise and method. Founder/CEO: ICP problem, category, and what your product changes. You can paste your LinkedIn intro.
author.contentArchetypeHint: Steers your Persona and posts: expert (know-how), company/product (category + proof), or both.
author.contentArchetypeFounder: Company / product — talk about my offer and category

contentArchetypePicker.title: Who do you highlight on LinkedIn?
contentArchetypePicker.hint: This choice calibrates your Persona and editorial line.

expert.label: My expertise
expert.hint: Consulting, method, field insights — personal voice.

founder_product.label: My company / product
founder_product.hint: Leader, founder, sales: ICP problem, category, product proof.

hybrid.label: Both
hybrid.hint: Alternate expertise posts and offer-grounded stories.

companyProfile.title: Your offer (optional but recommended)
companyProfile.subtitle: Feeds your Persona and product posts — not brochure tone.
companyProfile.offerNamePlaceholder: e.g. HR platform for exporting SMBs
companyProfile.categoryThesisHint: One sentence: market problem you address and positioning.
companyProfile.categoryThesisPlaceholder: e.g. SMBs lose talent without internal skills visibility…
companyProfile.differentiatorsHint: Customer results, proof, differentiators — no feature list.
companyProfile.differentiatorsPlaceholder: e.g. Live in 2 weeks · -30% turnover in 12 months (anonymized)

author.contentLanguage: Primary language for generated LinkedIn posts
author.contentLanguageHint: Sets the default language for posts and shapes how your Persona is written. Translation with localization is still available when creating posts.

errors.requiredFields: Complete the required fields (LinkedIn, role, positioning, language) before continuing.

author.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid http(s) URL.
author.saveFailed: Could not save. Check Firestore rules.

bioDocuments.title: Reference documents
bioDocuments.description: CV, bio PDF, or Google Doc · AI extracts text to calibrate your Persona and posts.
bioDocuments.trustNote: We only read content you provide, never scrape without your consent.
bioDocuments.fileHint: Accepted formats: PDF, TXT, or Markdown · max {maxMb} MB. Text is extracted to enrich your profile.
bioDocuments.addLink: Add a link (Google Doc, web page…)
bioDocuments.linkHint: For Google Docs: Share → “Anyone with the link” with view access. Without this, import will fail.

errors.notAuthenticated: Sign in to manage your documents.
errors.empty_extracted_text: No usable text could be extracted.
errors.google_doc_not_accessible: Google Doc not accessible · check sharing settings.
errors.missing_file_or_link: Choose a file or enter a URL.

sources.title: Your posts (for tone)
sources.description: Links to your own LinkedIn posts or articles · the AI uses them to calibrate your voice.

fullProfile.anytimeBody: This section enriches your Persona (voice, inspirations, documents). Complete or edit it anytime, no need to redo onboarding.
fullProfile.enrichBody: Nothing to re-enter: your LinkedIn, role, and language are already here. Only add what interests you.
fullProfile.capturedHint: You can still edit these via Modify in each section.
fullProfile.voiceExtrasHint: The sections below are new optional additions to refine your voice.

inspirations.pageSubtitle: Add LinkedIn posts or profiles you admire. Say what you like, the AI uses it to enrich your Persona without copying text.
inspirations.embeddedSubtitle: LinkedIn posts or profiles you like, with the traits you want to borrow.
inspirations.postsDescription: Add as many LinkedIn posts as you like (yours or others) : capture the energy, not the wording.
inspirations.profilesDescription: Add multiple creators whose LinkedIn feeds inspire you.
inspirations.addedSuccess: Saved, you can add another below.
inspirations.duplicateUrl: This link is already in the list.
inspirations.maxReached: Limit reached for this link type (20 max. per category).
inspirations.aspectsLabel: What I like about this link
inspirations.aspectsHint: Pick one or more traits, or explain why below.
inspirations.whyPlaceholder: e.g. personal storytelling, concrete numbers, soft CTA…
inspirations.empty: Paste a LinkedIn link below to get started.
inspirations.needAspectOrWhy: Select at least one trait or describe why you like this link.
inspirations.personaHint: After adding inspirations, regenerate your Persona to apply them:

guide.title: How to copy a LinkedIn link?
guide.postStep1: Open the post on LinkedIn (app or browser).
guide.postStep2: Click « … » (More) at the top right of the post.
guide.postStep4: Paste the URL here, it often starts with linkedin.com/posts/ or linkedin.com/feed/update/.
guide.profileStep2: Copy the URL from the address bar (linkedin.com/in/name).
guide.profileStep3: Paste the URL in the field below, the type is detected automatically.
guide.tip: On mobile: share the post to « Copy link », or open the profile in the browser to copy the URL.

inspirations.unifiedDescription: One place for all references: post or profile. Paste the link and note what speaks to you (tone, angle, format…).
inspirations.addFormHint: Post vs. profile is detected automatically from the URL.
inspirations.invalidLinkedInUrl: Use a post link (…/posts/…) or profile link (…/in/…).

audience.title: Who you write for
audience.subtitle: Helps AI target your readers. A rough sketch is enough, you can refine later.
audience.targetPlaceholder: e.g. French SME leaders expanding internationally
audience.focusPlaceholder: Themes, angles, not a service catalog
audience.optionalNote: All fields are optional · you can skip this step without filling anything.
audience.emojiIntro: Default preference for future posts (change per post when refining).
audience.syncingPersonaHint: AI is integrating your audience and preferences into your Persona. Allow 30–90 seconds · do not close this page.
audience.targetHint: Describe your ideal reader in one sentence · AI uses it to steer tone and topics.
audience.contentFocusHint: Themes, angles, key messages, not a service catalog.
audience.skipHint: Without this step, AI infers your reader from your profile. You can return here anytime.

persona.title: Your expert Persona
persona.subtitle: What AI understood about you. Review, adjust if needed, validate · everything stays editable.
persona.generatingHint: AI is analyzing your links and audience. This may take 30–90 seconds · do not close the page.

reveal.title: Here’s what the AI understood about you
reveal.subtitle: Review these four pillars before validating. They feed every LinkedIn generation, the full prompt stays available below.
reveal.validatedSubtitle: This summary stays your editorial compass. Refine the prompt or start creating.
reveal.audienceSkipped: Audience step skipped, the AI infers your reader from your profile.
reveal.audienceEmpty: Audience not specified : complete target or validate anyway.
reveal.cardEmpty: Add this in your profile or prompt.
reveal.editHint: Click any pillar to adjust the text before validating : changes update the Persona prompt.
reveal.promptHint: Text the AI reads on every generation, editable before validation.

help.guideHint: Topic DNA, LinkedIn rules, auto-learning : in brief.
help.promptBody: Text the AI reads on every generation. Look for ## Topic DNA and ## LinkedIn operating rules, your editorial DNA.

contentBrain.title: Content Brain
contentBrain.body: The Persona is the expert system behind every post: voice, structure, allowed and forbidden topics. The sharper it is, the less you edit after generation.

topicDna.title: Topic DNA
topicDna.body: Content pillars (3–5 recurring themes), belief statements (what you stand for), and off-topic list (what to refuse). Your LinkedIn thematic compass.

operatingRules.title: LinkedIn rules
operatingRules.body: Native format, credible proof, anti-AI patterns, goal of qualified comments. These rules avoid generic content and engagement bait.

learned.title: Learned preferences
learned.body: At the bottom of the prompt, a section added from your post feedback (tone, emojis, length). It grows without wiping your base.

validate.title: Validation
validate.body: Validate when the prompt reflects your voice. Until validated, post creation stays blocked, your quality gate.

measurement.title: Measurement loop
measurement.body: After validation, record signals on published posts (saves, comments, DMs). The AI suggests Persona tweaks based on what performs.

gaps.title: Complete your profile
gaps.subtitle: Answer these questions to refine your Persona and future LinkedIn posts. You can save partially and come back later.
gaps.help: AI-generated questions when info is missing (sector, proof, CTA…). Answers enrich your profile and future Persona versions.
gaps.multiLimitReached: Maximum 3 selections, uncheck one to add another.
gaps.rankHint: Use the arrows to rank from most important (top) to least important (bottom).
gaps.saved: Answers saved : preferences applied to your Persona.
gaps.saveSlowHint: Use Regenerate if you want the AI to rewrite the full Persona from your profile.

persona.noLlmKey: Set up your API key before generating.
persona.invalidApiKey: Your API key was rejected by the provider. Update it in the API key step.
persona.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits on your provider account (e.g. Anthropic). Top up on the provider console, then try again.
persona.loadFailed: Could not load the Persona page. Check your connection and try again.
persona.generateTimeout: Generation took too long (over 2 minutes). Try again.
persona.pillarSaveFailed: Could not save this pillar. Try again.

history.title: Version history
history.subtitle: The 10 most recent prompt updates (up to 3 months). Restore an earlier version if an automatic update does not fit.
history.empty: No archived versions yet : history fills in when the Persona changes.
history.restoreConfirm: Replace the current Persona with the version from {date}? The current version will be archived too.

insights.title: Measurement loop → Persona
insights.subtitle: Synthesize what works on your published posts (signals entered after validation) to refine your Persona.
insights.help: After publishing on LinkedIn, record saves, qualified comments, or DMs on each validated post. The AI suggests Topic DNA adjustments from these signals.
insights.generatingHint: AI compares your LinkedIn signals and suggests Persona updates (30–60 s).
insights.needSignals: Record at least one signal on a validated post (post detail page) before synthesizing.
insights.failed: Could not generate insights. Try again.
insights.noLlmKey: Configure your API key before synthesizing.
insights.invalidApiKey: API key rejected. Update it in API key setup.

recentUpdates.title: Latest Persona updates
recentUpdates.subtitle: The last 2 integrations (profile, article feedback, your notes).
recentUpdates.help: Journal of recent changes, not full history. Useful to see what the AI integrated since your last visit.

refinement.title: Refine your Persona
refinement.subtitle: Add precise instructions: tone, topics, avoid list, examples. The AI updates the prompt and bumps the version.
refinement.help: Your instructions in plain language. The AI rewrites the Persona keeping Topic DNA and rules : ideal to fix drift without full regeneration.
refinement.placeholder: E.g. Emphasize international networking, less tech jargon, always end with an open question…
refinement.failed: Could not apply your notes. Try again.
refinement.noLlmKey: Configure your API key before refining the Persona.
refinement.invalidApiKey: API key rejected. Update it in API key setup.

trialTeaser.title: Full Persona prompt (Pro)
trialTeaser.body: Upgrade to Pro to export and refine the full system prompt.

articles.title: Sample posts
articles.descriptionPending: Drafts and posts being refined, not yet validated for LinkedIn.

library.title: Library
library.description: Search, filter by status or scope, and rework posts by batch.
library.descriptionPending: Draft or refining posts : ready to finalize for LinkedIn.
library.batchSummaryAria: Toggle session from {dateTime}, {count, plural, one {# post} other {# posts}}
library.searchPlaceholder: Search by hook, content, or brief…
library.batchHiddenNote: {count, plural, one {# older session hidden (10 max).} other {# older sessions hidden (10 max).}}
library.batchCollapseHint: The latest session stays open. Older ones are collapsed: use the chevron to expand.

scope.label: Help: post scope
scope.body: Generalist = broad angle, readable outside your immediate niche. Niche = expert angle, specific ICP, domain vocabulary. In multi-post batches, the mix balances reach and credibility.

lot.label: Help: post batch
lot.body: A batch groups posts from one generation session (same intention and brief). Useful to compare variants or continue a series created on the same day.

scopeFilter.label: Help: scope filter
scopeFilter.body: Filter by generalist (broad) or niche (expert) posts. Labels come from scope at creation or batch position (2 generalist · 2 niche).

scopeMix.label: Help: generalist / niche mix
scopeMix.body: On a 4-post batch, the typical mix is 2 generalist + 2 niche posts: broad reach plus expert credibility. Counts reflect this session only.

nichePanel.label: Help: target niche
nichePanel.body: One line: one reader, one concrete problem. It builds on your Persona (Topic DNA) and audience : refine it anytime. The agent uses it as an anchor so your message stays focused.
nichePanel.scopeBody: Niche focus = expert angle and precise ICP. Broader = still in your expertise, but more open angles to widen reach without writing for everyone.

creatorRadar.title: Content creators in your niche
creatorRadar.subtitle: 3 daily suggestions, keep who inspires you, dismiss the rest. Fresh batch tomorrow.
creatorRadar.needsPersonaBody: Generate your Persona first to get creators aligned with your niche.

needs_persona.title: Persona too thin for radar
needs_persona.body: We need a rich enough Persona to infer your niche and suggest relevant creators.
tips: Generate or complete your Persona (Topic DNA, audience, angle).
Come back here: the radar will refresh automatically.

needs_niche.title: Niche not specific enough yet
needs_niche.body: The radar doesn't know precisely who you write for. Without a clear niche, suggestions stay generic.
tips: Fill in “Niche (reader + problem)” in your audience profile.
Add one LinkedIn creator you admire under Inspirations, it helps calibrate tone and level.

no_creators_found.title: No creators found for now
no_creators_found.body: The AI couldn't suggest 3 credible profiles with your current context. Enrich your profile and try again.
tips: Sharpen your niche (one reader, one concrete problem).
Add at least one inspiring LinkedIn profile you already follow.
If you dismissed today's picks, come back tomorrow for a fresh batch.

load_failed.title: Radar temporarily unavailable
load_failed.body: Loading failed. Check your connection and that your profile is complete enough.
tips: Complete niche + Persona if you haven't already.
Add a reference creator under Inspirations to guide the AI.

keep_failed.title: Could not save this profile
keep_failed.body: Saving to your LinkedIn inspirations failed.
tips: Try again in a moment.
Or add the profile manually under Setup → Inspirations.

no_llm_key.title: API key required
no_llm_key.body: The radar uses AI, no usable key was found on the server.
tips: Save your key under Settings → API key.

own_llm_required.title: Your own API key required
own_llm_required.body: Your plan doesn't include the platform key, the radar uses your personal key.
tips: Add an OpenAI, Anthropic, or Perplexity key in Settings.

platform_llm_unavailable.title: Platform AI unavailable
platform_llm_unavailable.body: Included platform AI could not connect (platform key missing or rejected).
tips: Try again in a few minutes.
On the free trial, you can also add your own API key in Settings.
tipsPlatformOnly: Try again in a few minutes.
If the issue persists, contact support, your plan uses included platform AI.

subscription_expired.title: Trial or subscription expired
subscription_expired.body: Creator radar requires active AI access.
tips: Upgrade to a paid plan to continue.

llm_request_failed.title: AI request failed
llm_request_failed.body: Creator lookup failed on the provider side : often temporary.
tips: Retry in 1–2 minutes.
If it persists, check credits and API key validity.

invalid_api_key.title: API key rejected
invalid_api_key.body: Your AI provider rejected the stored key.
tips: Check Settings → API key (correct provider, active key).

insufficient_credits.title: Insufficient AI credits
insufficient_credits.body: Your provider account has no credits left for this request.
tips: Top up your OpenAI / Anthropic / Perplexity account and retry.

rate_limit.title: Too many requests
tips: Wait a minute and click Retry.

no_llm_results.title: No creators returned
no_llm_results.body: The AI returned no usable suggestions.
tips: Sharpen your niche and add one reference inspiration profile.

no_valid_creators.title: Invalid profile URLs
no_valid_creators.body: Suggestions didn't include usable LinkedIn URLs.
tips: Retry tomorrow or enrich niche and inspirations.

nichePanel.title: Your target niche
nichePanel.subtitle: Writing for everyone reaches no one. One reader, one problem : that's what helps the algorithm show you to the right people.
nichePanel.fieldPlaceholder: E.g. B2B SaaS founders who struggle to turn LinkedIn expertise into pipeline
nichePanel.scopeHintNiche: Expert angle, precise ICP, domain vocabulary, your niche problem at the center.
nichePanel.scopeHintBroader: Still credible in your field, but more open angles beyond the core ICP.
nichePanel.conversationTip: Reach → conversations: end with a specific question for your target reader (no vanity metrics). When it fits, a comment-to-DM loop turns attention into pipeline.

articles.emptyPending: No pending posts. Create a new batch or view validated posts.
articles.needPersona: Validate your Persona before generating posts.
articles.description: Generate 3–4 LinkedIn posts, refine with guided questions, pick a CTA, and copy to LinkedIn.
articles.descriptionList: Your drafts and validated posts. Start a new batch with the creation assistant.

create.title: Create LinkedIn posts
create.subtitle: Choose how to start: from your profile, recent news, or existing content to repurpose.

setupReadyBanner.title: Your Content Brain is ready
setupReadyBanner.description: Your Persona powers every generation. Pick an intention below, the brief (problem, point of view, proof) gives the post its purpose.

briefReminder.title: Your brief gives the post its purpose
briefReminder.description: Pick a path below. At the brief step, the AI uses your Persona plus these three pillars : especially for “From my profile”.

help.label: Understand the brief
help.body: The brief steers generation: problem (what your reader faces), point of view (your distinct angle), proof (example, number, field note). LinkedIn objective (credibility, conversation…) adds on top for the profile path.

create.briefSubtitleShort: All fields are optional, the AI can suggest values from your Persona.
create.briefSuggestFailed: Could not suggest the brief. Fill in the fields manually.
create.incompleteObjective: Pick at least one objective to continue.
create.scopeHint: Generalist = broad angle · Niche = expert / ICP-specific angle.

modePicker.heroTitle: Your next LinkedIn post, in minutes
modePicker.heroSubtitle: Three paths, one promise: a draft in your voice, ready to refine and publish.
modePicker.strategyDrawerHint: Optional: recommended path and 3 themes based on your recent posts.
modePicker.decisionMatrixHint: Three intents, three paths — the brief adapts to how much detail you need.

guide.title: Not sure where to start?
guide.subtitle: Pick the intent that fits you : we’ll highlight the right path.
guide.regular: I want to publish from my expertise
guide.news: I want to react to the news
guide.repurpose: I want to repurpose existing content

hint.profile: → Expertise path: quick topic or full brief, aligned with your Persona.
hint.news: → News path: scan 4 recent stories, then 1 post anchored on your angle.
hint.inspiration: → Inspiration path: 1 draft with a distinct angle (no copying the source).

strategy.missingUrlBody: In My profile, paste your recent activity URL (e.g. …/recent-activity/all/) to enable AI analysis.
strategy.failed: Analysis failed. Retry or check the URL.
strategy.noLlm: Add your API key in Settings to run analysis.
strategy.perplexityRequired: LinkedIn post analysis requires Perplexity (Sonar) in Settings.
strategy.invalidKey: API key rejected by the provider. Check Settings → API key.
strategy.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits on your Claude (Anthropic) account. Top up at console.anthropic.com, then try again.
strategy.fetchUnavailable: Live LinkedIn analysis is unavailable. Add a Perplexity (Sonar) key in Settings for a reliable scan, or try again later.
strategy.rateLimit: Rate limit reached. Wait a few minutes and try again.
strategy.steeringHint: Tell the AI what to explore next: topic, sector, news, tone… It will reshape the 3 themes and recommended path.
strategy.steeringPlaceholder: E.g. focus on Japan and F&B supply chain, fewer “inspiration” posts, more concrete client cases…
strategy.postsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No recent posts detected} one {# post analyzed · {period}} other {# posts analyzed · {period}}}
strategy.highlightModeHint: Scroll down to the “{mode}” path below, it will be highlighted.
strategy.themesSelectHint: 1. Click to select a theme · 2. Then start adjustment (brief pre-filled).

profile.outcome: Quick topic or full brief · 1 draft in your voice.

news.outcome: 4 stories scanned · 1 commented post with source.

inspiration.outcome: Paste, link, library, or document · distinct angle.

profile.title: Expertise & angle
profile.desc: Describe your topic or complete the brief: one draft in your voice, aligned with your Persona.

news.title: From the news
news.desc: Pick a recent story in your niche: one commented post in your voice, with the source in the first comment.

inspiration.title: External source or document
inspiration.desc: From pasted text, a link, or a document: one rewritten draft with a distinct angle, without copying the source.

article.title: From my topic
article.desc: You already have the idea, describe the topic in a few lines, the AI structures the draft in your tone.

profileBrief.toggleHint: Start light with a topic, or open the full brief to refine objectives and proof.

quick.title: Quick topic
quick.desc: Describe your idea in a few lines — best when you already know what to say.

full.title: Full brief
full.desc: Objectives, problem, POV, and proof — for a more strategic post.

articleTopic.title: Your post idea
articleTopic.subtitle: Share what you want to communicate : choose a tone, then the AI helps you rephrase and structure it using your profile.
articleTopic.writingStyleHint: Pick how the first draft should sound. You can always edit afterward.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn / expert
linkedin.desc: Structured professional post aligned with your Persona and audience.

personal.title: Personal / authentic
personal.desc: First person, human tone : e.g. diploma, career step, meaningful news. The AI rephrases and structures your words without turning them into a generic LinkedIn post.

articleTopic.topicHelp: A clear subject in one line: what the post is about.
articleTopic.topicPlaceholder: E.g. I just completed my Executive Master at HEC Paris
articleTopic.messageHelp: Your story in your own words : feelings, context, what matters to you. The AI will rephrase, not replace your meaning.
articleTopic.messagePlaceholder: E.g. This journey took three years alongside my role as plant director. The hardest part wasn't the exams, it was learning to lead change while still being in the field…
articleTopic.examplePlaceholder: E.g. Final project on operational excellence in automotive supply chain, grade 18/20…
articleTopic.ctaPlaceholder: E.g. Thank the teams who supported me; invite peers to share their own learning path
articleTopic.ctaHint: Optional, the Quality Panel can suggest improvements based on your profile after generation.
articleTopic.incomplete: Add a topic (8+ characters) and your main message (8+ characters).
articleTopic.afterGenerate: After generation: edit freely, run the Quality Panel, adjust tone, add translations, then validate when ready.
articleTopic.afterGeneratePersonal: After generation: the draft stays in your voice (first person). Use the Quality Panel for suggestions grounded in your profile, then edit and validate when ready.

recentPosts.title: Rework an existing post
recentPosts.subtitle: Pick a post you already generated to create a new version with a distinct angle.
recentPosts.maxHint: Showing up to the {max} most recent posts.

profile.title: Expertise & angle
profile.desc: 1 draft from your Persona — quick topic or full brief.

news.title: From the news
news.desc: Scan 4 recent stories, pick one, then get 1 post reacting in your voice.

inspiration.title: External source or document
inspiration.desc: Paste text, a link, upload a document, or a saved inspiration: 1 draft with a distinct angle.

inspiration.inputTitle: How do you want to provide the reference?
inspiration.inputSubtitle: The AI draws on structure and tone without copying the source. Paste, link, upload a document, or reuse your library.
inspiration.referenceRequired: Complete the reference (text, URL + excerpt, document, or saved inspiration).

paste.title: Paste a post or article
paste.desc: Full text copied from LinkedIn, a blog, etc.

url.title: Link to content
url.desc: URL + automatic text fetch (or edit the excerpt manually).

library.title: My saved inspirations
library.desc: {count, plural, one {# source} other {# sources}} in your library
library.descEmpty: Add inspirations on the dedicated page to reuse them here.

document.title: Upload a document
document.desc: PDF, DOCX, or Google Doc link — reuse notes, studies, or source articles.

inspiration.documentSubtitle: Select a document already imported in your profile, or add a new one.
inspiration.documentEmpty: No usable document yet. Upload a file to use it as reference.
inspiration.urlHint: Paste the URL, then use “Fetch content” to prefill the excerpt. You can still edit it before continuing.
inspiration.fetchFailed: Could not fetch content. Paste the excerpt manually or check the URL.
inspiration.fetchNoContent: No usable text on this page. Paste the excerpt manually.
inspiration.fetchLinkedInPerplexity: LinkedIn posts need a Perplexity (Sonar) API key in Settings, or paste the post text yourself.
inspiration.fetchPerplexityHint: For hard pages (LinkedIn, paywalls), a Perplexity key in Settings improves fetch results.
inspiration.excerptPlaceholder: Paste the post text or key passages from the article here…
inspiration.excerptHelp: At least 40 characters. Do not copy verbatim, the AI must rewrite.
inspiration.libraryHint: LinkedIn posts or profiles you saved with the aspects to reuse.
inspiration.optionalExcerptPlaceholder: Paste an excerpt to anchor the AI on a specific passage…
inspiration.optionalExcerptHelp: Without an excerpt, the AI uses the URL, label, and your “why I like it” notes.

create.newsIntro: We scan 4 recent publications for your domain. Select the story to anchor on.
create.pasteHint: Paste the full text (LinkedIn post, article excerpt, etc.). The AI will propose a new angle, not a paraphrase.
create.pastePlaceholder: Paste the source post or article here…
create.pasteRequired: Paste at least a few lines of reference text.
create.draftDoneHint: Review the title and body, adjust the angle if needed, pick a CTA, then validate, same as the full editor.
create.regeneratingDraftHint: New angle from the same brief, the current text will be replaced.

news.title: News of the moment
news.subtitle: 4 stories from the last 7 days, matched to your domain. Pick one, then generate one LinkedIn draft anchored on that story (with source citation).
news.empty: No recent news found. Refine your topics below or try again.
news.noResults: No usable stories for your criteria. Refine your topics or try again.
news.noResultsGeneric: Could not load any stories. Refine your topics or try again.
news.noResultsEmpty: The search returned no results. Add keywords or check your API key.
news.noResultsFiltered: Stories were found but none passed the 7-day filter. Try different topics.
news.refineHintDefault: Add sectors, regions, or themes to steer the news scan.
news.refineHintFiltered: Broaden or sharpen your topics : returned dates or sources were outside the window.
news.refineHintNoLlm: The search returned nothing. Add concrete keywords (sector, country, trend).
news.refinePlaceholder: e.g. Mexico nearshoring, supply chain, SME export, energy…
news.refineHelp: At least 3 characters. Saved to your profile for future scans.
news.perplexityHint: For reliable web results, a Perplexity (Sonar) API key is recommended in Settings.
news.fullArticleHint: For the full published text, open the article on the source website.
news.pickOne: Select a news item before generating.
news.selectedTitle: Create your LinkedIn posts from this story
news.selectedExplain: The AI will draft one LinkedIn post reacting to this story in your voice and Persona, not a neutral press recap.
news.citationNote: Posts name the source without a URL in the body (better LinkedIn reach). The full article URL will be suggested in your first comment under the post.
news.generateFromNews: Generate a LinkedIn post from this story
news.generateFromNewsHint: 1 story-anchored draft · source link in the first comment (not in the post body).

articles.briefIncomplete: Could not start generation : please try again in a moment.

brief.title: Batch brief
brief.subtitle: Steers the draft toward your LinkedIn goal : problem, POV, and proof when you add them.
brief.optionalHint: All fields are optional, the more detail you add, the more refined the draft.
brief.refinementTip: Keep refining problem, POV, and proof for a more targeted draft.
brief.objectivesHint: Select up to 3 objectives. Rank 1 is the primary driver for tone and CTA.
brief.objectivesMax: Maximum 3 objectives, deselect one to add another.

objectiveDescriptions.credibility: Establish authority with proof and expertise.

brief.problemPlaceholder: E.g. SMB exporters struggling to secure supply chains…
brief.problemNewsPlaceholder: E.g. Record fines on Asian markets : what it means for investors…
brief.problemInspirationPlaceholder: E.g. The piece describes sector consolidation : what your reader should take away…
brief.pointOfViewPlaceholder: E.g. The real lever isn't price but end-to-end visibility…
brief.proofPlaceholder: E.g. client case, internal metric, field observation
brief.incomplete: Enter at least 8 characters for problem, POV, and proof.

postAngle.title: Angle for this post
postAngle.hint: Choose whether this draft highlights expertise or your offer.
postAngle.productFocusPlaceholder: e.g. Launch, SaaS HR case study, pricing objection…

objective.label: Help: objective
objective.body: Pick 1–3 objectives (credibility, conversation, awareness, leads) and rank them 1–3. Priority 1 drives tone and CTA.

problem.label: Help: audience problem
problem.body: What your target reader is dealing with (situation, tension, business stake). The more specific the context, the more expert the post sounds.

problemNews.label: Help: topic or stakes
problemNews.body: What the story is about and why it matters to your audience. You do not need to invent a “pain point”, the news or trend can already be the angle.

problemInspiration.label: Help: content angle
problemInspiration.body: What you take from the pasted content and why it matters to your reader. News, analysis, or opinion is enough, not always a classic customer problem.

proof.label: Help: proof
proof.body: Lived example, metric, client case, or field observation : what makes the post credible, not generic.

postAngle.label: Help: post angle
postAngle.body: Expertise = personal POV. Product = ICP problem and offer proof — not a brochure.

niche.title: Niche clarity
niche.warning: Brief is too generic, add sector, ICP, or proof before publishing.

feedback.brief_too_generic: This brief could target any professional on LinkedIn.
feedback.brief_niche_ok: Good specificity, the brief anchors identifiable expertise.
feedback.brief_could_be_sharper: OK, but a sector detail or metric would strengthen credibility.

suggestions.add_sector_or_metric: Add a sector, target role, or concrete metric.
suggestions.detail_problem: Detail the problem (who, where, when, business impact).

format.title: Format & distribution
format.subtitle: Recommended native LinkedIn format, carousel/video repurposing, and a first comment to seed discussion.
format.carouselHint: Consider a 5–7 slide carousel : generate the outline below, then visuals in Illustration.
format.repurposeHint: Same angle as the post: LinkedIn slide outline + 45–90s script.
format.firstCommentHint: Paste this as your first comment right after posting to seed qualified discussion.
format.firstCommentHintNews: For news-based posts: paste this comment right after publishing, it includes the source with the URL (keep links out of the post body).

translate.title: Translations
translate.subtitle: Produce a version in your target language. LinkedIn length and line breaks respected.
translate.literalHint: Same structure and meaning, fitted to LinkedIn character limits.
translate.localizedHint: Rewritten for the local audience (references, spelling, market examples).
translate.noLlm: Add your API key in Settings.

slop.title: Generic phrasing (AI / LinkedIn style)

help.label: Help: cliché detection
help.body: Flags LinkedIn / AI “template” phrases (game changer, excited to share, numbered lessons…). Instant local analysis, no API call. Not an overall post grade, a signal to personalize before publishing.

slop.intro: This panel flags wording everyone sees on LinkedIn and that AI tools often reuse (“game changer”, “excited to share”, numbered lessons, etc.). It is not an overall quality grade for your post, only a signal to make it more personal, concrete, and credible.
slop.howItWorks: The app compares your text to a built-in list of known patterns : instant analysis, no API key used. Scores update as soon as you edit the hook or body.
slop.humanScoreHelp: Higher (near 10/10) means fewer generic clichés detected, the post sounds more like a real person wrote it.
slop.slopScoreHelp: Higher (near 10/10) means more template-style phrases. Aim for 1–3 before you publish.
slop.guidanceClean: Good sign: keep going and add concrete proof (metric, case study, field observation) plus your personal angle.
slop.guidanceMild: Worth refining: replace flagged phrases with your own words, a lived example, or a more direct line.
slop.guidanceHeavy: Priority: rewrite generic passages, use Apply feedback or the LinkedIn Quality levers (more proof, more niche…).
slop.flagsHint: These are lines readers have already seen many times : rework them in your voice.
slop.warning: Many clichés detected: rewrite with more proof, a niche angle, and a voice that sounds like you before posting on LinkedIn.

summary.empty: Empty text, nothing to analyze yet.
summary.clean: Few generic phrases: tone feels fairly personal.
summary.mild_slop: Some typical LinkedIn / AI wording : rephrase to stand out.
summary.heavy_slop: Many generic phrases, a focused rewrite is recommended.

flags.at_end_of_day: At the end of the day

quality.title: LinkedIn quality
quality.subtitle: Scores and levers for credible, niche, conversational posts.

help.label: Help: Quality Panel
help.body: Four scores (niche clarity, human voice, proof, conversation) plus targeted rewrite levers. Not an official LinkedIn grade, a guide to refine before publishing.

quality.linkWarning: An external link appears in the post body. LinkedIn often reduces reach : prefer putting it in a comment.
quality.linkWarningNews: This post is anchored on news: remove the link from the body (LinkedIn reach penalty). Generate or copy the first comment below, it will include the source URL.
quality.revisingHint: AI is applying the selected lever (usually 10–25 s).

articles.generatingHint: AI is writing 4 posts from your Persona (30–90 s).
articles.noLlmKey: Set up your API key before generating.
articles.invalidApiKey: API key rejected. Update it in API key step.
articles.empty: No posts yet. Open the creation assistant to generate your first drafts.

cta.title: Choose your CTA
cta.subtitle: 3 suggestions aligned with the brief objective (conversation, save, leads…) : pick intensity.
cta.loadFailed: Could not generate CTAs. Try again.
cta.pickOne: Select a CTA (soft, medium, or pushy).

help.label: Help: CTA
help.body: Three intensities (soft, medium, pushy) aligned with your brief. Validation merges the chosen CTA, hashtags, and prepares copy for LinkedIn.

illustration.title: LinkedIn illustration
illustration.subtitle: Recommended visual type for this post + 3 short prompts to copy.
illustration.loading: Analyzing the post for visual ideas…
illustration.promptsHint: Paste a prompt into DALL·E, Midjourney, Ideogram, Adobe Firefly, or a stock site.
illustration.inlineHint: 3 image prompts to copy into Midjourney, DALL·E, Ideogram, or Adobe Firefly.

articles.scopeMix: {generalist, plural, one {# generalist post} other {# generalist posts}} · {niche, plural, one {# niche post} other {# niche posts}}

hint.default: Tone aligned with your Persona : balanced and professional.
hint.corrosive: Challenges a received idea or an "obvious" angle (including news). Forbidden: insults, politics, racism : even as humor.

refinement.title: Refine this post
refinement.tone: Does the tone match your voice?
refinement.theme: Does the theme / angle work for you?
refinement.length: Is the length right for LinkedIn?

detail.reviseFailedHint: Wait 30–60 s, shorten the global comment, or try again. Use Apply feedback in Refine, not Validate. Technical detail appears below when available.
detail.reviseJsonFailed: The model returned an invalid format. Retry in 30 s or switch models in Settings.
detail.reviseRateLimit: Rate or quota limit reached. Wait a minute and try again.
detail.reviseTimeout: Revision timed out. Try again with a shorter comment.
detail.reviseEmptyResponse: The model returned an empty response. Try again.
detail.needRefinement: Answer at least one question, enable contrarian tone, add a comment, or provide news details if you choose Yes.
detail.validateFailedHint: Pick a CTA, check your API key, then try again. Validation prepares the LinkedIn copy (hashtags + export) without rewriting the whole post.
detail.ctaOrCreate: Pick an existing CTA or create one:
detail.validatingHint: CTA integration, global coherence pass, hashtags, and export (20–40 s).
detail.revisingHint: AI is applying your feedback to the post (usually 10–25 s).
detail.hashtagsHint: 4 LinkedIn hashtags will be appended at the end (content + profile) when you validate.
detail.copyLinkedInHint: Text is on your clipboard. If LinkedIn’s composer is empty, paste with Ctrl+V (Cmd+V on Mac). Auto-publishing requires a LinkedIn connection (coming later).
detail.copyFailed: Could not copy. Allow clipboard access or copy the text manually.
detail.newsAnchor: Batch generated from this news story
detail.newsSourceInComment: The source citation with the article URL belongs in your first comment (Format section), not in the post body.
detail.inspirationAnchorHint: Generated from a reference : rewritten angle with your Persona, no plagiarism.

topicDna.label: Help: Topic DNA
topicDna.body: Recurring themes, convictions, and off-topic rules in your Persona (## Topic DNA section). Every post and CTA follows them : edit Persona if tone drifts.

refine.hint: Answer the questions, adjust tone, then regenerate the post before picking a CTA.

analysis.title: Quality & generic phrasing
analysis.hint: LinkedIn scores, rewrite levers, and cliché detection : open when you want to polish before validating.
analysis.hintValidated: Re-check clichés before republishing a variant.

cta.hint: 3 CTA options + validate to prepare LinkedIn copy (hashtags included).

enrich.title: Format, translation & repurposing
enrich.hint: Recommended format, carousel, video script, first comment, and translations.

illustration.title: Illustration
illustration.hint: Visual suggestions and image prompts : loaded when you open this section.

share.title: Share
share.hint: Send the post by email or WhatsApp (Ultra Content Maker mention, not in LinkedIn copy).

share.title: SHARE
share.hint: Send this post to a colleague by email or WhatsApp. The Ultra Content Maker mention is added for sharing only (not in the LinkedIn copy).

news.title: Previous news
news.subtitle: Stories archived from your posts page : browse details or regenerate 2 posts (brief is set on the posts page).
news.subtitleArchive: Your 10 latest news searches. The most recent one stays open: pick a story to create a post.
news.archiveLimitNote: Older searches are collapsed. Use the chevron to expand them.
news.createPostFromArchive: Create a post from this story
news.archiveCreateHint: You will continue to the brief, then generate a LinkedIn draft anchored on this story.
news.briefOnArticles: Set up the brief on the posts page →
news.empty: No archived news yet. Run a scan from the creation assistant.
news.pickOne: Select a news story before generating.
news.generateFromNewsHint: 1 generalist + 1 niche post, both anchored on this news.
news.generatingHint: AI is writing 2 posts from your Persona (30–60 s).
news.premiumRequired: Archived news is available on Pro and Pro+.

express.title: Express start
express.subtitle: LinkedIn and language are enough for a first test. The AI reads your profile and drafts a Persona : refine everything later.
express.trustNote: Targeted read of your public LinkedIn profile · never scraped without your input. All fields remain editable.
express.linkedinHint: Paste your profile URL (linkedin.com/in/…), then click Scan to prefill role and bio.
express.scanProfileHint: Click Scan for an influence-oriented read of your LinkedIn : role and bio stay editable.
express.contentLanguageHint: Used for Persona and drafts. Translation is available when creating posts.
express.rolePlaceholder: e.g. Founder · B2B automation for SMBs
express.positioningPlaceholder: Short bio: expertise, audience, proof, distinctive angle…
express.prefillSuccess: Profile analyzed : tweak the suggestions below if needed.
express.prefillFailed: Could not analyze right now. Retry or fill the fields manually.
express.profileNotAccessible: LinkedIn profile not accessible (bad URL or private profile). Check the URL or enter role and bio manually.
express.fullProfileLater: To go further (inspirations, documents, LinkedIn activity):
express.continue: Generate my Persona and try it

errors.notProfileUrl: Use your profile URL (…/in/your-name), not a post.
errors.personaFailed: Persona not generated, you can run it from the Persona step.
errors.llmNotConfigured: AI connection unavailable. Scan uses your public LinkedIn data, retry or fill in manually.
errors.subscriptionExpired: Your trial or subscription has expired. Renew to use AI analysis.

questions.tonePlaceholder: Too formal? More direct? Preferred tone…

draftReview.successBody: We received your adjustments and will refine the post accordingly.

brain.description: Generate and validate the Content Brain for this persona. Available in the next phase.

history.description: Past generations and exports for this persona. Available soon.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save. Check Firestore rules and connection.

pricing.title: Choose your publishing pace
pricing.subtitle: Free trial, then Pro or Pro+ depending on how hands-on you want to be. Platform AI included on trial and Pro+.

pro.name: Pro

support.title: Managed production
support.subtitle: We draft and refine with you : for founders and executives who want to delegate editorial work.
support.quoteProcess: After every quote request, we schedule a video call or phone call with our team to scope your needs in detail.
support.quoteHint: Reply within 24 business hours · video call or phone call to scope your needs · custom quote.

custom.name: High-frequency or bespoke rhythm
custom.description: Aiming for near-daily presence, higher volume, or a specific editorial setup? We build a plan tailored to your context.

quoteForm.dialogSubtitle: Describe your needs : we'll get back within 24 business hours to schedule a video call or phone call with our team.

errors.generic: Could not send. Try again or email us directly.

pricing.compareHint: Pro = your API key (OpenAI, Perplexity…). Pro+ and Trial = platform AI included.

upgrade.activateBody: Card or wire transfer, your workspace unlocks once confirmed.
upgrade.proBlurb: You manage your API key : full control of AI costs.
upgrade.proPlusBlurb: Platform AI included · {posts} posts / month with no key setup.

wire.loginRequired: Sign in to request a wire transfer.

wire.referenceHint: Include this reference in the wire memo.
wire.wireSent: Thank you : we'll activate your account upon receipt.

terms.title: Commercial terms
terms.hint: Amount, minimum commitment (3 months default), notice (1 month). Regenerate proposal after changes.

accept.title: Activate Support contract
accept.subtitle: Validate after receiving the signed proposal by email. Activates the offer on the client account, records the contract and creates a draft invoice. A welcome email is sent automatically to the client.
accept.userIdHint: The client must already have an Ultra Content Maker account.
accept.success: Contract activated and draft invoice created.

templates.title: Proposal template (in-app)
